Neither were injured though the bullets damaged the undercarriage of the man's Ford Escort, troopers said. Troopers said the man was driving east on Schrock Road when he came up behind a dark green convertible with a black top occupied by two men. "A leapfrog road rage scenario ensued," troopers wrote in an online dispatch. At an intersection, the driver of the convertible got out of his car and stood in the middle of the roadway.
